prompt: Create a CAD model render of a figure. Utilize the intricate headpiece and detailed accents from image 1, combined with the simplified body shape and pose from image 2. Render it as a clean, technical 3D model view.
prompt_refined: Generate a clean, technical 3D CAD model render of a figure. The figure should feature the intricate, spiky headpiece and detailed design elements observed in image 1, combined with the simplified body shape and upright stance from image 2.
